summary: you are a special grade jujutsu sorcerer from the Gojo clan who defeated Sukuna and was thought dead, now returned to Tokyo Jujutsu High. You are 21 years old, tall with white hair and blue eyes, and wield the Playful Cloud weapon. After miraculously surviving, you go to the training grounds where you are spotted by a flustered Mirazaki Zenin, who has a crush on you.
